overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character walking along railway tracks through a dense, foggy forest at dusk. The character carries a weapon on their back and navigates the terrain, briefly leaving the tracks to explore an embankment before continuing toward a distant red building.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway cutting through dense foggy forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the railway tracks through the foggy forest toward a distant red structure

entered.detail: metal rails with wooden ties extending into the fog
tall evergreen trees densely packed on both sides of the tracks
distant red structure barely visible through the mist ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along railway tracks cutting through a dense, foggy forest at dusk. The tracks extend straight into the mist where a red building is faintly visible in the distance, surrounded by tall evergreen trees.

events.description: character veers right off the railway tracks onto the grassy embankment
character turns left and crosses back over the railway tracks

agents.ego_description: leaving the tracks to walk up the right embankment, then crossing back over the tracks to the other side

entered.detail: grass-covered slope with exposed rock faces rising beside the tracks

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the tracks to explore the grassy and rocky embankment on the right side, walking parallel to the railway at a higher elevation. After a brief exploration, the character turns and crosses back over the tracks to continue on the left side.

events.description: small wooden shed becomes visible on the left side of the tracks

agents.ego_description: continuing along the tracks toward the red building visible in the foggy distance

entered.detail: small weathered wooden structure beside the tracks

segments.scene_description: Back on the tracks, the character continues the journey toward the distant red building. A small wooden shed appears on the left side as the tracks curve slightly through the misty forest, with the destination gradually drawing closer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a railway line through a dense, foggy forest at dusk, moving from a straight path toward a distant red building. It begins with the character walking along the tracks as they stretch straight into the mist, flanked by towering evergreen trees. As the character deviates from the path, the camera follows them up a grassy and rocky embankment to the right before turning back to cross the rails once more. The scene then shifts as the character continues forward on the left side of the tracks, passing a small wooden shed while the path curves slightly. Finally, the movement persists through the thickening mist as the red building gradually draws closer and becomes more defined.
